college.name: JCT College of Engineering and Technology

about.description: JCT College of Engineering and Technology is an autonomous engineering institution in Coimbatore, established in 2009. It focuses on technical education, industry exposure, and practical training, aiming to prepare students for real-world engineering challenges.
about.affiliation: Affiliated to Anna University and approved by AICTE

eligibility.be-btech: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics with required cutoff as per norms
eligibility.lateral-entry: Diploma in relevant engineering stream with minimum qualifying marks

process: Apply through TNEA counselling or direct admission

courses.name: B.Tech. Artificial Intelligence and Data Science
B.E. Computer Science and Business Systems
Ph.D. Electrical and Electronics Engineering (Doctoral Programme)

facilities: Central library with large collection of books and journals
Hostel facilities (separate for boys and girls)

placements.description: The college has an active placement cell that provides training and organizes campus recruitment drives.

infrastructure.campus_size: Large campus with academic blocks, labs, and sports areas
infrastructure.library: Extensive collection of books, journals, and digital resources

faq.a: Yes, it is an autonomous institution affiliated with Anna University.

faq.q: How many engineering courses are offered?
faq.a: The college offers 11 undergraduate programs, 3 postgraduate programs, and a doctoral program in Electrical and Electronics Engineering.
Yes, companies like TCS, Cognizant, Zoho, and Reliance visit the campus for recruitment.
Yes, separate hostel facilities are available for boys and girls.
